title: nasturtiastrum latifolium
intro: Nasturtiastrum latifolium, also known as tansy, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its fern-like leaves and bright yellow flowers. Traditionally, tansy has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms of bloating and gas. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce the risk of certain diseases, such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. In herbal preparations, tansy is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and nausea.
